HexNote

Welcome! One-time Setup

HexNote stores your docs on your own Google Drive. To get started, you'll need free Google Cloud credentials. This takes about 5 minutes and only needs to be done once.

Show me how (5-minute setup guide)
  1. Go to Google Cloud Console and create a new project
  2. Go to APIs & Services → Library → search Google Drive API → Enable
  3. Go to APIs & Services → Credentials → + Create Credentials → OAuth client ID
  4. If prompted, configure the OAuth consent screen (External, fill in your email, skip the rest)
  5. Application type: Desktop app → Create
  6. Click the download icon to get the JSON file
  7. Open the JSON file, copy its contents, and paste below

This is 100% free. Google Drive API has no usage charges at any scale. Your credentials belong to you — HexNote never sees them.

HexNote

Sign in to Google

Click below to authenticate with your Google account. A browser window will open.

Waiting for authentication... Check your browser.

HexNote

How would you like to start?

Join a Shared Workspace

Select a folder that was shared with you, or paste a Drive folder link.

or

HexNote

No workspaces yet. Create one to get started!

Choose a Google Drive Folder

Select an existing folder or create a new one. This folder will be your workspace root.

Workspace

Ready

Start Writing

Create a new page or folder to get started.

Exports all pages as .md files with YAML frontmatter, preserving the folder hierarchy.
